productDisplayName: Puma Men Apex Black Olive Sandal
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Apex floaters from puma. This pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic uppers with synthetic woven tape straps on the forefoot and ankle attached by a diagonal strap across the midfootVelcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for a snug FitLogo name on the ankle strap, cat logo on the midfoot diagonal strap and brand name on the pull tabLightly cushioned lining for better comfortMidsoleCushioned foam footbed with hexagonal pattern for all-day comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for superior gripshoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
